records.question: Which companies based in the USA have at least 184.8 billion in assets, no more than 189.6 billion in sales, and no more than 19.0 billion in profits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.assets_billion >= 184.8 AND companies.sales_billion <= 189.6 AND companies.profits_billion <= 19.0 AND companies.headquarters = 'USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Companies WHERE Headquarters = 'USA' AND Assets_billion >= 184.8 AND Sales_billion <= 189.6 AND Profits_billion <= 19.0

records.question: Which Banking companies named BNP Paribas are headquartered in France and have a market value of 88 billion, assets of 2680.7 billion, sales of 130.4 billion, and profits of 10.5 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE companies.headquarters = 'France' AND companies.name = 'BNP Paribas' AND companies.market_value_billion = '88' AND companies.assets_billion = 2680.7 AND companies.sales_billion = 130.4 AND companies.profits_billion = 10.5 AND companies.industry = 'Banking'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Companies WHERE Industry = 'Banking' AND name = 'BNP Paribas' AND Headquarters = 'France' AND Market_Value_billion = '88' AND Assets_billion = 2680.7 AND Sales_billion = 130.4 AND Profits_billion = 10.5

records.question: What companies in the Banking industry headquartered in China have market value exactly 224.8 billion, profits at least 15.6 billion, sales no more than 58.2 billion, and assets at most 1408.0 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
WHERE companies.assets_billion <= 1408.0 AND companies.market_value_billion = '224.8' AND companies.profits_billion >= 15.6 AND companies.sales_billion <= 58.2 AND companies.industry = 'Banking' AND companies.headquarters = 'China'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Companies WHERE Industry = 'Banking' AND Headquarters = 'China' AND Market_Value_billion = '224.8' AND Profits_billion >= 15.6 AND Sales_billion <= 58.2 AND Assets_billion <= 1408.0

records.question: Which companies have office locations in buildings where the status is under construction?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.status = 'under construction'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN buildings AS T3 ON T2.building_id = T3.id WHERE T3.Status = 'Under Construction'

records.question: Which Petrobras companies headquartered in Brazil with profits exactly 21.2 billion and sales of at least 121.3 billion have offices in Mexico City that moved in during 2031 or later into 44-story buildings that are 200 meters tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.city = 'Mexico City' AND companies.profits_billion = 21.2 AND office_locations.move_in_year >= 2031 AND companies.headquarters = 'Brazil' AND companies.name = 'Petrobras' AND buildings.stories = 44 AND buildings.height = 200 AND companies.sales_billion >= 121.3
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN buildings AS T3 ON T2.building_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name LIKE '%Petrobras%' AND T1.Headquarters = 'Brazil' AND T1.Profits_billion = 21.2 AND T1.Sales_billion >= 121.3 AND T3.City = 'Mexico City' AND T2.move_in_year >= 2031 AND T3.Stories = 44 AND T3.Height = 200

records.question: Which companies have exactly 1723.5 billion in assets and have office locations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE companies.assets_billion = 1723.5
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.Assets_billion = 1723.5

records.question: Which BNP Paribas companies have a market value of 88 billion, assets of at least 2680.7 billion, profits of at most 10.5 billion, and are located in buildings with proposed status?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.status = 'proposed' AND companies.assets_billion >= 2680.7 AND companies.profits_billion <= 10.5 AND companies.market_value_billion = '88' AND companies.name = 'BNP Paribas'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Office_locations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN buildings AS T3 ON T2.building_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name LIKE '%BNP Paribas%' AND T1.Market_Value_billion = '88' AND T1.Assets_billion >= 2680.7 AND T1.Profits_billion <= 10.5 AND T3.Status = 'Proposed'
